title: koeleria gracilis var. latifolia
intro: Koeleria gracilis var. latifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved June grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria gracilis var. latifolia include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them in a tea blend.
